hvp.name: 💫 1. My social circle
hvp.intro: Erasmus+ Program Priorities (inclusion and diversity)
hvp.json_content:
{"media":{"disableImageZooming":false,"type":{"params":{}}},"overallFeedback":[{"from":0,"to":100}],"behaviour":{"scoringMode":"positions","applyPenalties":true,"duplicatesInterchangeable":true,"addButtonsForMovement":true,"enableRetry":true,"enableSolutionsButton":true},"l10n":{"checkAnswer":"Comprobar","submitAnswer":"Enviar","tryAgain":"Reintentar","showSolution":"Mostrar solución","up":"Arriba","down":"Abajo","disabled":"Deshabilitado"},"a11y":{"check":"Comprobar las respuestas. Las respuestas serán marcadas como correcta o incorrecta.","showSolution":"Mostrar la solución. La solución correcta será mostrada.","retry":"Reintentar el trabajo. Reiniciar todos los elementos y comenzar el trabajo de nuevo.","yourResult":"Usted obtuvo @score de un total de @total puntos","listDescription":"Lista ordenable de párrafos.","listDescriptionCheckAnswer":"Lista de párrafos con resultados.","listDescriptionShowSolution":"Lista de párrafos con soluciones.","paragraph":"Párrafo","correct":"correcto","wrong":"incorrecto","point":"@score punto","sevenOfNine":"@current de @total","currentPosition":"Posición actual en lista","instructionsSelected":"Presione la barra espaciadora para reordenar","instructionsGrabbed":"Presione las teclas de flechas arriba y abajo para cambiar posición, barra espaciadora para soltar, escape para cancelar","grabbed":"Agarrada","moved":"Movida","dropped":"Soltada","reorderCancelled":"Reordenar cancelado","finalPosition":"Posición final","nextParagraph":"Párrafo siguiente","correctParagraph":"Párrafo correcto en posición"},"taskDescription":"

Rank the answers from highest to lowest sample of intercultural skills or knowledge.

How diverse is your social circle?

Do you have social relations with people of different religions, cultures, ethnicities or sexual orientations?

","paragraphs":["

Yes, my social circle reflects the diversity around me. I believe that a diverse group of friends can really enrich your life.

","

I have one or two friends from different backgrounds. I do not make a great effort to make new friends with people who have different perspectives or beliefs.

","

I talk to people from different backgrounds in an academic context, but I generally find it difficult for us to become good friends.

","

No, I do not. I prefer to socialise with people closer to my environment.

"]}
